title: Emerald Gear Mod
description: This mod adds a new gear of emerald.This mod requires v16.0.0-rc.1 or later version of modmenu.
body:
Elevate your Minecraft gameplay with the **Emerald Gear Mod**, introducing a full set of powerful emerald-based tools and armor. Every item is meticulously balanced for durability, mining efficiency, and combat effectiveness, designed to surpass iron while remaining below diamond.

**Features:**

**Tools:**
Custom Emerald Tools: **Sword**, **Axe**, **Pickaxe**, **Shovel**, and **Hoe**, each with optimized attack damage, attack speed, and mining speed for balanced gameplay.

**Armor:**
Emerald Armor Set: **Helmet**, **Chestplate**, **Leggings**, and **Boots** crafted from emerald, providing solid protection and durability.

**Specification:**
Enhanced Gameplay: Tools mine _faster than iron_, and _armor offers a unique visual identity_.

**Compatibility:**
**1.21.10 Fabric Compatible:** Fully compatible with the latest Fabric loader and designed for smooth integration with your existing world.

Customizable: Easily tweak material stats in code for personal balancing or future updates.

**Why Play With This Mod:**
Upgrade your toolkit and armor without breaking game balance. Whether you’re mining deep caverns, exploring dangerous biomes, or fighting mobs, Emerald Gear Mod gives you reliable, high-performance gear with a unique emerald aesthetic.


**Important Note:**
